name: qwen-coding-agent
description: Production-grade CLI coding agent powered by Qwen LLM

scripts.setup: npm install && cd desktop && npm install
scripts.desktop:dev: cd desktop && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.desktop:build: cd desktop && npm install && npm run build
scripts.desktop:preview: cd desktop && npm install && npm run preview
scripts.verify: npm run build && cd desktop && npm install && npm run build
